channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Internal Architecture Repository
item.description: Entry point for Vox internal architecture SSOTs, research findings, and planning documents.

item.title: Actors & Workflows
item.description: Deep dive into Vox's primary concurrency primitives: Persistent Actors for stateful messaging and Durable Workflows for reliable orchestration.

item.title: AI Agent Orchestration
item.description: How Vox natively integrates LLMs, agents, and local logic via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Distributed Execution Intelligence (DEI) orchestrator.

item.title: Explanation: Capabilities
item.description: Understanding the Capability-Gated Execution limits applied to workflows and agents.

item.title: Explanation: The Vox Runtime
item.description: Understand the inner workings of the Vox runtime—the engine that powers AI-native, stateful applications.

item.title: Explanation: Security Model
item.description: Understand the security constructs, permissions, and sandbox boundaries in the Vox ecosystem.

item.title: Glossary: Vox Terminology
item.description: Authoritative vocabulary for the Vox language, runtime, and AI orchestration ecosystem.

item.title: How-To: Model Complex Domain Logic
item.description: Learn how to use Vox's expressive type system.

item.title: How-To: The Database Layer
item.description: How to perform CRUD operations, type-safe queries, and indexing using Vox's integrated database layer.

item.title: How-To: Deploy to Production
item.description: Declarative deployment using the environment keyword and the vox deploy command for OCI-compatible containerization.

item.title: How-To: Handle Errors Gracefully
item.description: Learn the best practices for error management in Vox to build robust applications.

item.title: How-To: Islands and Pages
item.description: How to build and route full-stack web UIs using islands in Vox.

item.title: How-To: Scale Actors
item.description: Strategies for distributing and managing Vox actor lifecycles across a cluster.

item.title: How-To: System I/O and Capabilities
item.description: How to safely interact with filesystems and network endpoints.

item.title: How-To: Testing Integration
item.description: How to structure tests for Vox functions, workflows, and UI using the built-in testing framework.

item.title: How-To: Test Your Logic
item.description: Write automated test cases using Vox.

item.title: Database Query Reference
item.description: Complete syntactic reference for Vox db.* accessors and complex filtering criteria.

item.title: Reference: Decorator Registry
item.description: All available decorators and their technical effects.

item.title: Standard Library Reference
item.description: Core execution environment capabilities exposed in Vox (std.* and built-ins).

item.title: Language Syntax Reference
item.description: A comprehensive, scannable syntax quick-reference page.

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
